nasb.text: But the men who had gone up with him said, “We are not able to go up against the people, for they are too strong for us.”

esv.text: Then the men who had gone up with him said, “We are not able to go up against the people, for they are stronger than we are.”

cnv.text: 但是，那些與他同去的人卻說：“我們不能上去攻擊那民，因為他們比我們強。”

ccb.text: 跟他一起去打探的人却说：“我们不能去攻打那些人，他们比我们强大。”
